dataset: American Brands Legacy — shared recipe pool (pre-V3-revamp)

methodology.allergens: Essential-only 16-tag allergen vocabulary (Celery, Gluten, Crustaceans, Fish, Eggs, Lupin, Molluscs, Mustard, Nuts, Peanuts, Sesame, Soya, Sulphites, Sugared drink, Dairy, Lentils). Tagged only when an ingredient unambiguously declares the allergen — no 'might contain' speculation. Sesame flagged on classic American sesame/brioche buns; Fish flagged where Worcestershire-derived sauces (Caesar) appear (anchovy). Semi-finished components carry their own allergens, which are inherited into any dish that references them. Recipes with no qualifying ingredient are marked ['NO_ALLERGENS'].
methodology.calories: Estimated per-portion kcal computed as ingredient quantity × USDA/standard per-100g reference values. Pieces (buns, drinks, eggs, falafel) use per-unit kcal. Semi-finished component references resolved via per-gram kcal density of the SF. Wastage not applied. Rounded to integer. Estimates only.
methodology.brand_mapping: Legacy file has no brand column; dishes are shared across all American brands. Cross-reference with per-brand Master Menu files to tag ownership.

changelog.entry: Initial extraction from legacy American Recipes.xlsx for historic cost-comparison analysis.
Enriched recipes and semi-finished components with allergens (UAE/GCC 14-allergen standard) and estimated per-portion calories from USDA per-100g reference values.
Enriched recipes and semi-finished components with allergens (UAE/GCC 14-allergen standard) and estimated per-portion calories from USDA per-100g reference values.

Fixed ingredient-name data quirks (duplicated 'Sautéed Mushrooms (SF - Bulk)s (SF - Bulk)' suffix; singular 'Sautéed Onion' canonicalized to 'Sautéed Onions (SF - Bulk)'). Re-tagged allergens for all recipes and semi-finished components under new 16-tag cloud-kitchen aggregator taxonomy. Dialed back Sulphites: now flagged only on wine/dried-fruit/explicit sulphite-preserved items (no longer on pickles/gherkins/capers/balsamic).
Dialed back to essential-only allergen tagging; no 'might contain' speculation. Recipes without clear allergen sources marked ['NO_ALLERGENS'].
Allergen + calorie enrichment pass applied (essential-only 16-tag vocab; USDA per-100g kcal). SF component allergens inherited into referencing dishes.
Allergen + calorie enrichment pass applied (essential-only 16-tag vocab; USDA per-100g kcal). SF component allergens inherited into referencing dishes.
Allergen + calorie enrichment pass applied (essential-only 16-tag vocab; USDA per-100g kcal). SF component allergens inherited into referencing dishes.
Drift fix: zero-kcal beverages set to 0 (was null). Composite/placeholder recipes left null.
